content.explanation:
**Irregular Verbs — V1, V2, V3 List:**

Regular verbs में simply +ed लगता है: walk → walked → walked
Irregular verbs को अलग-अलग याद करना पड़ता है!

**Most Important Irregular Verbs:**

| V1 (Base) | V2 (Past) | V3 (Past Participle) | Hindi |
|-----------|-----------|----------------------|-------|
| go        | went      | gone                 | जाना |
| come      | came      | come                 | आना |
| eat       | ate       | eaten                | खाना |
| see       | saw       | seen                 | देखना |
| do        | did       | done                 | करना |
| make      | made      | made                 | बनाना |
| take      | took      | taken                | लेना |
| give      | gave      | given                | देना |
| get       | got       | got/gotten           | मिलना |
| know      | knew      | known                | जानना |
| think     | thought   | thought              | सोचना |
| speak     | spoke     | spoken               | बोलना |
| write     | wrote     | written              | लिखना |
| read      | read      | read                 | पढ़ना |
| run       | ran       | run                  | दौड़ना |
| buy       | bought    | bought               | खरीदना |
| find      | found     | found                | ढूंढना |
| tell      | told      | told                 | बताना |
| send      | sent      | sent                 | भेजना |
| break     | broke     | broken               | तोड़ना |
rules: V1 = base form (dictionary form): go, eat, write
V2 = simple past: went, ate, wrote (used in Simple Past)
V3 = past participle: gone, eaten, written (used with have/has/had)
Some V1=V2=V3: cut, put, set, hit, hurt, let, cost, read (pronunciation changes!)
Regular verb pattern: V2 = V3 = V1+ed (work-worked-worked)
content.memoryTrick:
**3 Groups of Irregular Verbs:**
1. AAA = All same: cut-cut-cut, put-put-put
2. ABB = V2=V3: buy-bought-bought, make-made-made
3. ABC = All different: go-went-gone, see-saw-seen
Flashcards बनाओ और रोज़ 5 learn करो!

examples.english: She gave me a gift. (gave = V2 of give)

examples.hindi: क्या तुमने यह film देखी है?
examples.english: Have you seen this movie? (seen = V3 of see)
He ran 5 km. (ran = V2 of run)
I have written the letter. (written = V3)
They bought all the sugar. (bought = V2/V3 of buy)

examples.hindi: Report कहाँ है? — भेज दी गई है।
examples.english: Where is the report? — It has been sent. (sent = V3)

mistakes.why: V3 of go = gone (not went — went is V2)
V3 of eat = eaten (not ate — ate is V2)

speakingTips: रोज़ सुबह 10 irregular verbs V1-V2-V3 form में बोलो
Sentences बनाओ: 'Yesterday I ate...' / 'I have eaten...' — same verb, different forms
बच्चों को games खिलाओ: Irregular verb snap/memory card game

practice.hindi: वह रोज़ सुबह जल्दी उठता है। (उठना)
practice.english: He wakes up early every morning. (wake - woke - woken)
alternatives: he gets up early every morning.

practice.hindi: मैंने कल रात बहुत अच्छा खाना खाया। (खाना)
practice.english: I ate very good food last night. (eat - ate - eaten)
alternatives: i had a great meal last night.

practice.english: She runs very fast. (run - ran - run)
alternatives: she is a very fast runner.

practice.english: He wrote me a letter. (write - wrote - written)
She came here last month. (come - came - come)
Children played in the park. (play - played - played)
alternatives: the kids played at the park.

practice.english: I bought a new book. (buy - bought - bought)

practice.hindi: वह हर रात ख़्वाब देखता है। (सोना/देखना)
practice.english: He dreams every night. (dream - dreamed/dreamt - dreamed/dreamt)
I spoke to him. (speak - spoke - spoken)
She cleaned the room. (clean - cleaned - cleaned)
She sings a song. (sing - sang - sung)
I made my breakfast. (make - made - made)
He will go to the office tomorrow. (go - went - gone)
alternatives: he will head to office tomorrow.

practice.hindi: हम आज जल्दी घर आ गए। (आना)
practice.english: We came home early today. (come - came - come)
She told me the truth. (tell - told - told)
alternatives: she spoke the truth to me.

practice.english: The child broke the glass. (break - broke - broken)
He laughed loudly. (laugh - laughed - laughed)
I gave him a gift. (give - gave - given)
He is reading a book. (read - read - read)
alternatives: he is going through a book.

practice.english: The child cried. (cry - cried - cried)
He gave the exam. (give - gave - given)
practice.hint: give an exam = take an exam

practice.english: She learns very quickly. (learn - learned/learnt - learned/learnt)
I fulfilled my responsibility. (fulfill - fulfilled - fulfilled)

practice.hindi: वे सब मिलकर काम करते हैं। (काम करना)
practice.english: They all work together. (work - worked - worked)

practice.hindi: उसने नई जगह visit की। (visit करना)
practice.english: She visited a new place. (visit - visited - visited)
